Fresh, feminine, romantic outdoor portrait walking through a white plum blossom garden, soft Korean lifestyle photography.

Na Ka plum valley hillside, Moc Chau, Vietnam, long narrow path between two rows of blooming white plum trees.

Clear sunny afternoon, soft natural daylight, bright sky, clean sunlight with gentle shadows.

Two symmetrical rows of white plum blossom trees forming a natural corridor, earthy grass path underfoot, depth perspective leading into the distance, soft floral bokeh.

White chiffon maxi dress, semi-sheer layered skirt, puff sleeves, fitted waist with thin gold belt, lightweight flowing fabric, elegant and modest, white low heels, natural makeup, soft wavy black hair.

Full body vertical shot, walking slowly toward camera, one foot stepping forward, arms relaxed and slightly swinging naturally, gentle smile, eye contact with camera, dress subtly flowing with movement.

CONCEPT:
Soft romantic outdoor portrait of a young woman walking through blooming plum blossom gardens, fresh, feminine, natural, gentle, dreamy spring atmosphere.

BACKGROUND:
Na Ka plum blossom valley, Moc Chau, Son La, Vietnam. Rolling hills covered with white plum blossom trees. A small dirt path running through the orchard. Flowers filling both sides of the frame. Golden hour sunset, sun low behind the trees, warm peach-orange sunlight shining through branches, soft haze, glowing backlight, natural bokeh, shallow depth of field, airy and cinematic landscape.

Pure white midi dress, lightweight chiffon or silk fabric, soft and flowy. Short puff sleeves, round neckline, fitted waist, loose A-line skirt. Fabric slightly translucent and moving gently with the wind. Minimal accessories, small earrings or none, natural styling.

POSE & FRAMING:
Full body or three-quarter portrait. Standing or slowly walking on the path. One hand gently touching or holding a plum blossom branch. The other hand lightly lifting the dress hem. Soft smile, warm eye contact with camera. Relaxed shoulders, graceful posture, feminine and elegant movement. Hair softly flowing in the breeze.
